Name: Spark
Description: Fire a bolt of 1 Lightning Damage.
Lore: A spark of inginuity, flickering to your target and giving them a gentle jolt.

Name: Minor Kinesis
Description: You make an object levitate and can move it through the air up to 6 tiles, it remains suspended each turn you recast this spell, cannot be used for combat.
Lore: To make a stone levitate, the first spell most young casters learn.

Name: Arcane Gust
Description: Upon taking melee damage, you may push the creature that injured you away by 3 tiles.
Lore: A defensive burst to make some distance.

Name: Kinetic Swing
Description: Perform a melee strike with your weapon, it deals +1 Force Damage.
Lore: To strengthen the very core of a weapon, simply charge it up with mana!

Name: Force Nudge
Description: Attempt to displace a target by 1 tile in any direction to a valid position, they must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Lore: If you ever don't like where someone is standing, give em a lil nudge.

Name: Sphere of force
Description: Command an area to experiance higher gravity, dealing 1 force damage to all creatures in the radius, they must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Lore: Their knees will hurt after that!

Name: Mana Sense
Description: You can see the flow of mana around you, you can identify what type of magic an item/creature is emitting.
Lore: To see the fabric of reali- oh wait, it just makes that guy glow blue.

Name: Arcane Mark
Description: Mark a creature, the next spell you cast against that creature, deals +1 Lightning Damage.
Lore: A focused mote of magic awaits the next moment of weakness.

Name: Static Veil
Description: Coat yourself in lightning, the next creature that hits you takes 1 damage.
Lore: Like rubbing socks on a carpet, make yourself a lil zappy!

Name: Focus
Description: Grant yourself +2 Accuracy on your next Melee/Ranged attack.
Lore: Take a moment, take a breath.

Name: Whispers
Description: You attempt to impose -2 Accuracy onto a creature you can see, they must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Lore: Whispers to cloud the mind, whispers to cloud the soul.

Name: Maw of the Void
Description: Upon taking damage, you attempt to deal 2 Damage to the target that struck you, they must roll [Reflex] to resist.
Lore: Let the teeth of the void sink into their soul.

Name: Mind Needle
Description: Fire a needle of 2 Pshycic Damage.
Lore: A sharp pain through the eye, your mind is left questioning what it just felt.

Name: Grim Focus
Description: Your weapon damage is treated as Dark in addition to any other type.
Lore: Envelope your blade in the fog of death.

Name: Echo Hex
Description: You create a hexed Tile, the Hex is invisible, any creature that steps atop it must succeed a [Reflex] check or take 1 Dark Damage, then the tile disapates. You may only have 1 Hex up at a time.
Lore: A minor curse placed upon reality, confined to a single moment.

Name: Reflexive strike
Description: When a creature casts a spell, attempt to deal 1 Dark Damage to them, they must roll [Reflex] to resist.
Lore: Don't let them get away with it.

Name: Dread Murmur
Description: Release a cone of dark energy, dealing 1 Dark Damage and [Fearing] all creatures caught in the cone, they must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Lore: A smog of horror, like screaming faces, spews fourth staining all in its way.

Name: Mark of Unease
Description: You attempt to impose -2 Spirit onto a creature, they must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Lore: Use their own mind against themselves.

Name: Lingering Glance
Description: You lock eyes with a creature you can see. The next time they take damage before your next turn, they take +1 Psychic Damage. They must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Lore: A look that crawls beneath the skin, refusing to be forgotten.

Name: Sacred Glimmer
Description: You grant a creature a mote of healing, next time they get healed increase it by 1
Lore: A faint light answers even the quietest prayer.

Name: Guiding Touch
Description: Grant a touched creature +2 Accuracy on their next attack or spell.
Lore: Faith steadies the hand when doubt would make it tremble.

Name: Faith Ward
Description: When you take damage, reduce that damage by 1.
Lore: Belief is sometimes enough to turn a fatal blow aside.

Name: Hallowed Mark
Description: Mark a creature. The next attack made against that creature deals +1 Light Damage.
Lore: Light finds those who cannot hide from judgment.

Name: Mercy Spark
Description: Deal 1 Light Damage to a creature, or instead stabilize a creature to 1 Health.
Lore: Mercy and punishment share the same flame.

Name: Oathbound Focus
Description: Once per turn, when you deal damage, you may change the damage type to Light.
Lore: An oath shapes not just action, but intent.

Name: Consecrated Step
Description: You move up to 3 tiles without provoking reactions.
Lore: Where you tread, the faithful path opens.

Name: Light of Resolve
Description: When a creature within range fails a roll, grant them +2 to that roll after seeing the result.
Lore: Resolve shines brightest at the moment of failure.

Name: Sanctum Whisper
Description: You sense the presence of celestials, fiends, or consecrated areas within range.
Lore: The divine speaks softly, but never without purpose.

Name: Blessed Vigil
Description: Your total health increases by 2
Lore: Faith never truly sleeps.

Name: Ember Flick
Description: Deal 1 Fire Damage to a creature or ignite a small flammable object.
Lore: A flame barely born, yet eager to grow.

Name: Static Tap
Description: When you hit a creature with an attack, deal +1 Lightning Damage.
Lore: The storm answers instinctively.

Name: Frost Pulse
Description: Deal 1 Cold Damage and reduce the target’s movement by 1 tile until their next turn.
Lore: Cold does not rush. It claims.

Name: Stone Skin
Description: You ignore difficult terrain caused by earth or stone.
Lore: The ground remembers those who listen to it.

Name: Gale Nudge
Description: Push a creature or unsecured object 2 tiles in a direction of your choice. Creatures may roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Lore: Even the gentlest wind knows where it wants you to go.

Name: Ash Veil
Description: When you take damage, impose -2 Accuracy on the next attack made against you.
Lore: Smoke and embers blur hostile intent.

Name: Ripple Spark
Description: Deal 1 Lightning or Cold Damage to a creature you touch.
Lore: Energy flows like water, if you know how to stir it.

Name: Thermal Shift
Description: You gain resistance to either Fire or Cold damage until your next turn.
Lore: Heat and cold are just states of balance.

Name: Pressure Ping
Description: You sense the movement of creatures behind cover or in obscured areas until the start of your next turn.
Lore: Air shifts. Water trembles. Nothing moves unseen.

Name: Charge Residue
Description: Once per turn after casting an Elemental spell, your next attack deals +1 damage of the same type.
Lore: Power always leaves something behind.

Name: Mana Lance
Description: Fire a condensed lance of mana, dealing 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Force Damage to a creature.
Lore: Raw mana, sharpened into purpose.

Name: Force Shear
Description: Perform a melee weapon attack that deals +1 Force Damage and has +1 Accuracy.
Upcast: Increase the bonus Force Damage by +1.
Lore: A precise cut, slipping between reality’s defenses.

Name: Aether Step
Description: Teleport up to 5 tiles to a location you can see.
Lore: The space between moments bends to practiced will.

Name: Spell Shunt
Description: When you take damage from a spell, reduce the damage by [your Spell Damage Bonus].
Lore: Magic diverted is magic denied.

Name: Mana Snare
Description: You bind a creature in constricting mana, reducing their movement by 3 tiles until the end of their next turn. They must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Upcast: Increase the movement reduction by +1 tile.
Lore: Mana does not forgive those who struggle blindly.

Name: Arcane Anchor
Description: Anchor a creature in place. They cannot be forcibly moved until the start of your next turn. They may roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Upcast: Extend the duration by 1 additional turn.
Lore: Reality itself grips tight at your command.

Name: Unstable Surge
Description: Your next spell this turn deals +2 damage, but you take 1 Force Damage.
Lore: Power taken too quickly always leaves scars.

Name: Kinetic Ripple
Description: Release a wave of kinetic force, dealing 2 Force Damage and pushing all affected creatures 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] tiles away. Creatures must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Lore: A shockwave born from sudden intent.

Name: Mana Lock
Description: A creature you touch has their next spell cost +1 mana. They must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Upcast: Affects the next additional spell the creature casts.
Lore: Knowledge remains — access does not.

Name: Refraction Veil
Description: When you are hit by an attack or spell, impose -[your Spell Damage Bonus] Accuracy on that roll.
Lore: Light bends, fate follows.

Name: Vein Hex
Description: Curse a creature’s blood, dealing [your Spell Damage Bonus] Dark Damage. The next time they take damage before your next turn, they take +1 additional Dark Damage. They must roll [Fortitude] to resist the curse.
Lore: The body remembers what the soul tries to forget.

Name: Mind Sunder
Description: You tear at a creature’s psyche, dealing 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Psychic Damage and imposing -2 Spirit until the end of their next turn. They must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Lore: Thought is fragile when pulled from the wrong angle.

Name: Grasping Doubt
Description: Manifest spectral hands that reduce a creature’s movement by 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] tiles and impose -2 Accuracy until the end of their next turn. They must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Lore: Hesitation clings tighter than chains.

Name: Shadow Slip
Description: When you take damage, you may teleport up to 3+[your Spell Damage Bonus] tiles to an unoccupied space you can see, halving the damage.
Upcast: Increase the teleport distance by +2 tiles.
Lore: Pain is just another doorway.

Name: Echoing Curse
Description: Curse a creature. The next time they fail a roll before your next turn, they take [your Spell Damage Bonus] Dark Damage.
Lore: Mistakes linger longer when invited.

Name: Dread Focus
Description: Once per turn, when you deal Dark or Psychic Damage, impose -2 Accuracy on the target until the end of their next turn.
Lore: Fear sharpens attention — yours, not theirs.

Name: Blood Whisper
Description: Deal 2 Dark Damage to a creature. If the target is [Bleeding], they take +[your Spell Damage Bonus] additional Dark Damage.
Lore: The blood knows secrets the mouth refuses to tell.

Name: Veil Fracture
Description: Shatter the boundary between fear and reality, dealing [your Spell Damage Bonus] Dark Damage and [Fearing] all creatures in the cone. Creatures must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Lore: The veil breaks easiest where terror has already worn it thin.

Name: Soul Tether
Description: Bind your soul to a creature. Until the start of your next turn, when they take damage, you regain 1+[your Spell Healing Bonus] Health. They must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Lore: Suffering shared is suffering diminished.

Name: Night’s Interruption
Description: When a creature within range casts a spell, impose -2 Accuracy on that spell and deal [your Spell Damage Bonus] Psychic Damage. They must roll [Reflex] to resist.
Lore: Even darkness dislikes being disturbed.

Name: Grave Brand
Description: Brand a creature with a sigil of death, dealing 3 Dark Damage. Until the end of your next turn, the first time that creature takes damage, they take an additional [your Spell Damage Bonus] Dark Damage.
Upcast: Increase the triggered Dark Damage by +1.
Lore: Once marked, the grave watches closely.

Name: Mind Rend
Description: Rip violently through a creature’s thoughts, dealing 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Psychic Damage and imposing -3 Spirit until the end of their next turn. They must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Lore: Some ideas are better left intact.

Name: Lingering Malice
Description: Inflict a curse upon a creature for [your Spell Damage Bonus] turns. At the start of each of their turns, they take 1 Dark Damage and suffer -1 Accuracy.
Lore: Hatred rarely leaves all at once.

Name: Umbral Reversal
Description: When you would be reduced to 0 Health, instead remain at 1+[your Spell Healing Bonus] Health and teleport up to 4 tiles to a space you can see. This spell then ends.
Upcast: Increase the teleport distance by +2 tiles.
Lore: Death reached — then missed.

Name: Hex Collapse
Description: Detonate active curses and hexes in the area. Creatures affected by a curse take [your Spell Damage Bonus] Dark Damage, while un-cursed creatures take 1 Dark Damage.
Upcast: Increase the damage dealt to cursed creatures by +1.
Lore: All debts come due at once.

Name: Bloodbound Focus
Description: When you take damage, your next attack or spell before the end of your next turn deals +2 damage.
Lore: Pain sharpens purpose.

Name: Writ of Agony
Description: Inscribe a sigil of torment on a creature, dealing [your Spell Damage Bonus] Dark Damage and imposing [Fear] until the end of their next turn. They must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Lore: Suffering, formalized and signed.

Name: Veil Sink
Description: Create a zone of oppressive darkness in a 2-tile radius for [your Spell Damage Bonus] turns. Creatures inside the zone suffer -2 Accuracy and take 1 Dark Damage when they enter it.
Lore: The world grows heavier where the veil thins.

Name: Soul Fracture
Description: Shatter part of a creature’s soul, dealing 3 Psychic Damage. The target cannot benefit from healing until the end of their next turn. They must roll [Spirit] to resist.
Lore: Not all wounds are meant to close.

Name: Black Intercession
Description: When a creature within range would deal damage, reduce that damage by 3 and deal 2 Dark Damage to the source.
Lore: The dark protects its own — at a price.

Name: Starlance
Description: Hurl a lance of condensed starlight, dealing 2 Light Damage.
Upcast: When multicasting this spell, each additional cast may target a different creature.
Lore: A falling star, aimed by will alone.

Name: Void Drift
Description: You move up to 4 tiles, ignoring reactions and difficult terrain.
Lore: Space loosens its grip for those who know how to let go.

Name: Astral Flare
Description: A creature you can see takes 2 Light Damage and suffers -2 Accuracy on its next attack.
Upcast: When multicasting this spell, each additional cast may target a different creature.
Lore: Light burns brightest where attention wavers.

Name: Orbit Shift
Description: When you are targeted by an attack or spell, you may shift 2 tiles to an unoccupied space you can see.
Upcast: When multicasting this spell, each additional cast reduces the taken damage by 2.
Lore: Nothing strikes the same point twice if the stars disagree.

Name: Gravitic Nudge
Description: Push or pull a creature 2 tiles in a direction of your choice. They must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Upcast: When multicasting this spell, the direction may change between each cast.
Lore: Gravity is merely a suggestion.

Name: Starbound Focus
Description: Once per turn, when you cast a Cosmic spell, gain +1 Accuracy on the next spell you cast this turn.
Upcast: When multicasting this spell, the Accuracy bonus applies to each subsequent spell in the sequence.
Lore: Alignment breeds clarity.

Name: Celestial Thread
Description: Bind yourself to a creature you touch. Until the end of your next turn, whenever either of you moves a tile, the other may move 1 tile as well.
Upcast: When multicasting this spell, you may bind to an additional creature.
Lore: All things move together, whether they wish to or not.

Name: Event Horizon Blink
Description: When you would take damage, reduce that damage by 1 and teleport 3 tiles to a space you can see.
Upcast: When multicasting this spell, you may delay the teleport until after another spell resolves this turn.
Lore: There is always a way around the fall.

Name: Astral Echo
Description: Choose a creature you can see. The next time you cast a Cosmic spell targeting a different creature this turn, the chosen creature takes 1 Light Damage.
Upcast: When multicasting this spell, the echo may trigger once per additional cast.
Lore: The stars remember what you almost aimed for.

Name: Stellar Pressure
Description: Creatures in the cone take 2 Force Damage and are pushed 1 tile away from you. They must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Upcast: When multicasting this spell, you may rotate the cone between casts.
Lore: The weight of the heavens bears down all at once.

Name: Light Lance
Description: Hurl a lance of holy light, dealing 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Light Damage to a creature you can see.
Lore: Faith given form, sharp and unwavering.

Name: Sacred Intercession
Description: When a creature within range would take damage, reduce that damage by [your Spell Damage Bonus].
Lore: A hand reaches out before the blow can land.

Name: Oathbound Strike
Description: Make a melee weapon attack. On hit, it deals +2 Light Damage and the target cannot gain bonuses to Accuracy until the end of their next turn.
Upcast: Increase the bonus Light Damage by +1.
Lore: An oath strikes truer than steel alone.

Name: Beacon of Resolve
Description: Choose a creature you can see. Until the start of your next turn, they gain +2 Accuracy and cannot be [Frightened].
Upcast: Extend the duration by 1 additional turn.
Lore: Hope shines brightest when shared.

Name: Merciful Pulse
Description: A wave of gentle light heals a creature for 2+[your Spell Healing Bonus] Health or deals 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Light Damage to an undead or fiend.
Upcast: Increase the healing or damage by +1.
Lore: Mercy and judgment flow from the same source.

Name: Vowbound Focus
Description: Once per turn, when you uphold an oath or divine tenet determined by the Narrator, gain +1 Accuracy on your next attack or spell.
Lore: Conviction rewards the faithful.

Name: Hallowed Ground
Description: A 2 tile radius area around you becomes Hallowed ground, Allies gain +[your Spell Damage Bonus] Movement, enemies gain -[your Spell Damage Bonus] Movement.
Lore: Each step leaves a trace of purpose.

Name: Lightbound Rebuke
Description: When you are hit by a melee attack, the attacker takes 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Light Damage.
Lore: To strike the faithful is to invite the light’s reply.

Name: Sanctified Mark
Description: Mark a creature with holy sigils. The next attack made against that creature deals +2 Light Damage.
Lore: Judgment does not forget its target.

Name: Blessed Sanctuary
Description: Each scene you and 1 nearby ally within 3 tiles recover [your Spell Damage Bonus] Health, as long as you are concious.
Lore: Some prayers are never lowered.

Name: Storm Bolt
Description: Hurl a compressed bolt of lightning at a target in range. The target takes 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Lightning Damage and is briefly jolted, reducing its next movement by 3 tiles.
Upcast: Level 2+: Increase damage by +1. Level 3+: Jolt also prevents reactions until the start of the target’s next turn.
Lore: Stormcasters claim lightning remembers the path it takes, striking foes along lines only the sky can see.

Name: Stone Guard
Description: When you would take damage, harden your skin with earthen force, reducing the incoming damage by [your Spell Damage Bonus].
Upcast: Level 2+: Increase damage reduction by 1. Level 3+: Gain brief resistance to the triggering damage type.
Lore: Those who trust the earth are never truly unguarded, even when standing alone.

Name: Flame Step
Description: Ignite beneath your feet and instantly move up to 3 tiles. Enemies within 1 tile of your starting space take 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Fire damage.
Upcast: Level 2+: Increase movement by 2 tile. Level 3+: Leave a burning space behind until the end of the round.
Lore: Fire is impatient by nature, always urging its wielder forward.

Name: Frost Mark
Description: Mark a creature with chilling runes. Until the end of its next turn, its movement is reduced by 3 tiles and the next attack against it deals +2 Frost damage.
Upcast: Level 2+: Increase duration by 1 round. Level 3+: Frost damage bonus applies to all attacks against the target during the duration.
Lore: Cold remembers every wound, preserving pain like a perfect crystal.

Name: Inferno Pulse
Description: Release a burst of searing flame in a short cone. Creatures in the area take 2 Fire damage and ignite, taking 1 Fire damage at the start of their next turn. They must roll [Reflex] to resist.
Upcast: Level 2+: Increase cone size by 1 tile. Level 3+: Ignite damage increases by 1 and lasts an additional round.
Lore: Infernos are born not from rage, but from certainty that nothing should remain.

Name: Eye of the storm
Description: Your control over lightning sharpens. Once per turn, when you deal Lightning damage, you may increase that damage by 1 or reduce the targets movement by 3.
Upcast: Level 2+: May trigger twice per round. Level 3+: Reduction increases to 5.
Lore: To master the storm is not to command it, but to move at its pace.

Name: Cinders of Avarice
Description: Imbue a willing creature or weapon with smoldering fire. The next successful strike it makes deals +1 Fire damage.
Upcast: Level 2+: Effect lasts for two successful strikes. Level 3+: Bonus Fire damage increases by 2.
Lore: An ember shared is never diminished—only multiplied.

Name: Tidal Rebound
Description: When targeted by a ranged attack, conjure a surge of water that deflects the blow, reducing damage by 2 and pushing the attacker 1 tile.
Upcast: Level 2+: Increase damage reduction by 2. Level 3+: Push increases by 2 tiles.
Lore: Water does not stop an attack—it teaches it where not to land.

Name: Earthquake
Description: Cause the ground beneath a creature to rupture. The target takes Earth damage and must choose to either be knocked prone or lose an action on its next turn.
Upcast: Level 2+: Target suffers both effects. Level 3+: Nearby ground becomes difficult terrain for one round.
Lore: The earth does not strike swiftly—but when it moves, all must answer.

Name: Aether Sense
Description: You attune to elemental currents. You can sense the presence of strong elemental effects, active spells, or elemental creatures within a short distance.
Upcast: Level 2+: Increase sensing range to 12 tiles. Level 3+: You can identify the dominant element and its intensity.
Lore: Aether is the breath between elements, heard only by those who listen.

Name: Infernus
Description: You create a Tile of Rough Magmatic terrain. Any creature standing on the tile takes [your Spell Damage Bonus] damage each creatures turn.
Upcast: Level 2+: You can create +1 tile. Level 3+: Creatures must roll [Fortitude] to escape the tile.
Lore: Aether is the breath between elements, heard only by those who listen.

Name: Mana Brace
Description: When you would be pushed, pulled, or knocked prone, negate the movement and reduce any damage taken by 1.
Lore: When reality shifts, dig your heels into mana.

Name: Spell Lattice
Description: Until the start of your next turn, the first time you or an ally within 3 tiles is targeted by a spell, impose -3 Accuracy on that spell.
Lore: Interference patterns woven with intent.

Name: Shared Benediction
Description: Bless a creature. Until the end of your next turn, when they gain healing or a bonus, you gain the same benefit.
Lore: Grace multiplies when it is not hoarded.

Name: Lightbearer’s Reckoning
Description: When an ally within range is reduced to 0 Health, they instead remain at [your Spell Healing Bonus] Health and emit radiant light. Enemies within 2 tiles take 2 Light Damage.
Lore: Even falling can become testimony.

Name: Thought Leak
Description: A creature you can see takes 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Psychic Damage. Until the end of their next turn, the first time they succeed on a roll, they take 1 Dark Damage.
Lore: Victory tastes bitter when the mind is cracked.

Name: Sentence of Stillness
Description: Condemn a creature with oppressive silence. They cannot cast spells until the end of their next turn.
Lore: Judgment need not be loud to be absolute.

Name: Offset Trajectory
Description: When a ranged attack or spell is made within range, shift either the attacker or the target up to [your Spell Damage Bonus] tiles before the roll is resolved.
Upcast: When multicasting, each additional cast increases the amount moved by 1 tile.
Lore: A fraction of a degree decides everything.

Name: Probability Skew
Description: Choose a creature you can see. The next roll they make this turn gains either +2 or -2 Accuracy (your choice).
Upcast: When multicasting, You may choose a different creature per cast.
Lore: Chance bends easily when observed too closely.

Name: Searing Wake
Description: Move up to 3 tiles. Each tile you leave behind becomes scorched terrain; the first creature to enter each tile takes 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Fire Damage.
Upcast: Level 2+: Increase movement by +2 tiles. Level 3+: Scorched tiles deal +1 damage.
Lore: Fire remembers where you fled.

Name: Cryostatic Lock
Description: Encapsulate a creature in binding frost. They take 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Cold Damage and are immobilized until the end of their next turn unless they roll [Fortitude].
Lore: Cold does not rush — it waits until escape is forgotten.

Name: Null Interval
Description: When a creature within range resolves an action, suspend the result until the end of their next turn. Damage, movement, and conditions are delayed and apply simultaneously when the suspension ends.
Upcast: You may choose to cancel the suspended effect instead of releasing it.
Lore: A moment stolen from causality, returned with interest.

Name: Grand Aegis Array
Description: Until the end of your next turn, allies in range reduce all incoming damage by 4+[your Spell Damage Bonus] and cannot be forcibly moved. Each ally may ignore one failed defense roll during the duration.
Lore: The battlefield locks into a single, immovable theorem.

Name: Litany of Restoration
Description: Each ally in range immediately heals 8+[your Spell Healing Bonus] Health and removes one negative condition. Until the start of your next turn, the first time each ally would take damage, reduce it by 6.
Upcast: Healing increased by +4 and damage reduction applies twice.
Lore: Faith spoken aloud becomes shelter.

Name: Judgment Made Manifest
Description: Call down radiant judgment on a creature. They take 8+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Light Damage. If this damage reduces them to 0 Health, all allies who can see the target heal 6+[your Spell Healing Bonus] Health.
Lore: Mercy waits for those who survive the light.

Name: Stormbound Expanse
Description: The area becomes a violent lightning field until the end of your next turn. Creatures entering or starting their turn in the area take 4+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Lightning Damage and suffer -4 Accuracy.
Upcast: Damage increases by +4 and the area becomes difficult terrain.
Lore: The storm claims territory, not targets.

Name: Cataclysm Seed
Description: Plant a volatile elemental core at a point in range. At the start of your next turn, it detonates, dealing 6+[your Spell Damage Bonus] damage of an element of your choice to all creatures within 3 tiles and reshaping the terrain appropriately.
Lore: Every disaster begins as something small and patient.

Name: Phase Step
Description: Teleport up to 2 tiles to an unoccupied space you can see. Until the start of your next turn, you ignore difficult terrain.
Upcast: Increase teleport distance by +1 tile per cost.
Lore: Distance is only a suggestion.

Name: Spell Reversal
Description: When a creature casts a spell targeting you or an ally, invert one numeric modifier of the spell (bonuses become penalties or vice versa).
Lore: Magic hesitates when contradicted.

Name: Rewrite Outcome
Description: After any roll is resolved, force it to be rerolled and choose which result applies. The unused result is treated as if it never occurred.
Lore: Reality edits itself quietly.

Name: Consecrated Stand
Description: When you take damage, reduce it by 2 and gain +2 Accuracy on your next roll this turn.
Lore: Pain sharpens devotion.

Name: Beacon of Vows
Description: Until the end of your next turn, allies in range gain +1 Accuracy while adjacent to another ally.
Lore: Faith grows stronger when shared shoulder to shoulder.

Name: Ascension Moment
Description: An ally immediately takes another full turn after this one. That ally cannot be reduced below 1 Health during that turn.
Lore: For one heartbeat, the divine intervenes directly.

Name: Rolling Frost
Description: Create a moving wave of ice that travels 4 tiles in a straight line. Creatures hit take 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Cold Damage and have their movement reduced by 1 tile on their next turn.
Upcast: Increase damage by +1 or travel distance by +2 tiles, per upcast level.
Lore: Cold advances without urgency.

Name: Grasping Fault
Description: Crack the ground beneath a creature. They take 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Vibro Damage and the tile becomes difficult terrain that restrains the first creature entering it each scene.
Lore: The earth remembers every step taken upon it.

Name: Inferno Spiral
Description: A whirling firestorm fills the area until the end of your next turn. Creatures entering or starting their turn there take 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Fire Damage. The area is heavily obscured by smoke.
Upcast: Cost 4: Increase damage by +1 and radius by +1.
Lore: Fire does not explode — it envelops.

Name: Worldroot Eruption
Description: Massive elemental growth erupts from the ground. Creatures of your choice within 4 tiles are restrained and take 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Vibro Damage at the start of their next turn.
Lore: The land itself rises to object.

Name: Mana Flick
Description: Nudge a Small unattended object or magical effect 1 tile in any direction. If used on a spell zone or terrain effect, you may shift its origin by 1 tile instead.
Lore: Even magic can be poked.

Name: Steady Pulse
Description: When a creature you touch fails a defense roll, grant them +1 to that roll, potentially turning it into a success.
Lore: Faith answers in quiet moments.

Name: Spark
Description: Deal 1 Lightning Damage to a creature or object. If the target is Wet, Metallic, or standing in water, increase the damage to 2.
Lore: All storms begin with a thought.

Name: Frost Film
Description: Coat a tile or object in slick frost. The next creature entering the tile suffers -1 movement on their next turn.
Lore: Cold leaves warnings, not wounds.

Name: Ember Touch
Description: Deal 1 Fire Damage. If the target is affected by Cold or Ice, remove that effect before dealing damage.
Lore: Fire resolves disputes quickly.

Name: Thermal Shock
Description: When a creature affected by Fire takes Cold damage, or a creature affected by Cold takes Fire damage, trigger this spell. The creature takes [your Spell Damage Bonus] additional damage and is stunned until the end of their next turn.
Lore: Nature punishes indecision.

Name: Conductive Surge
Description: Deal 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Lightning Damage to all creatures in the area. Creatures that are Wet, Metallic, or standing in water instead take 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] damage.
Lore: Electricity follows opporttiley.

Name: Quench the Flame
Description: Extinguish all Fire effects in range. For each Fire effect removed, choose a creature in range to heal 3 Health.
Upcast: Affect one additional creature per Fire effect removed.
Lore: Even fire can be taught restraint.

Name: Shatterpoint
Description: Target a creature affected by Cold or restrained by ice. They take 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] damage. If the effect was Cold-based terrain or immobilization, it is destroyed.
Lore: Frozen things break cleanly.

Name: Climber's companion
Description: Deploy a magical ladder that can support itself in any orientation, it is 3 tiles tall. The ladder is dismissed when you reach the top and step off, or when you are not within 10 tiles of it.
Lore: Always useful to have one of these around.

Name: Pocket Workshop
Description: You deploy a compact 1 tile workshop, it grants you the benefits of a simple workshop, an apprentice brewers kit, an anvil and a ritualist station.
Lore: Always useful to have one of these around.

Name: Omnia of the Elements
Description: Choose an element. For the next 2 scenes, all damage you deal of that element is increased by +1.
Lore: To commit to one force is to let it flow freely through you.

Name: Earthen Manifestation
Description: Strike from a surface in a 1x4 line perpendicular to it, dealing 2 Vibro Damage and pushing creatures 1 tile away from the surface.
Lore: The earth answers best when given direction.

Name: Elemental Fortification
Description: Create full cover on an adjacent tile. It has durability equal to mana spent +2.
Lore: Stone and frost both understand protection.

Name: Heavy Rain
Description: Deal 1 Vibro Damage. The target is buried and knocked prone. While buried, they cannot be directly targeted and gain +25 Weight.
Lore: When the sky falls, the ground answers.

Name: Stone Cutter
Description: Create a simple component of earth such as a brick or stone tool.
Lore: All structures begin with a single shaped piece.

Name: Toughen Up
Description: Gain +2 Armor for this scene.
Lore: The body remembers stone.

Name: Thorn Embrace
Description: Disable all non-basic movement of a target for 2 turns unless they roll [Fortitude].
Lore: Nature does not chase—it binds.

Name: Forest Blessing
Description: Heal an ally for 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Health.
Lore: Life returns what it is given.

Name: Camofoliage
Description: Grant Advantage on stealth checks in natural terrain until used.
Lore: To hide, become part of the whole.

Name: Wildfire
Description: Deal 1 Fire Damage. Each time you cast this in the same combat, increase its damage by +1 (max +5).
Lore: Fire learns from itself.

Name: Wall of Fire
Description: Create a 4-tile wall of fire that obscures sight. Creatures passing through take [your Spell Damage Bonus] Fire Damage. Lasts 2 rounds.
Lore: Fire draws boundaries none wish to cross.

Name: Flame On
Description: For 2 scenes, your unarmed strikes deal +1 Fire Damage and attackers take [your Spell Damage Bonus] Fire Damage. Grapplers or Grappled take 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Fire Damage.
Lore: To burn is to exist loudly.

Name: Soothing Fire
Description: You take no damage from your own fire. When affected by fire, heal 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Health per instance.
Lore: Not all flames consume.

Name: Chain Lightning
Description: When casting a Lightning spell, you may spend 1 additional mana to hit a second target within 4 tiles.
Lore: Lightning refuses to end where it begins.

Name: Bouncing Arc
Description: Deal 1 Lightning Damage. The spell jumps up to 3 times to the nearest new target within 3 tiles.
Lore: Energy seeks the path of least resistance.

Name: Trial by Lightning
Description: Create a storm. Each turn, strike a random enemy for 1+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Lightning Damage. Costs 1 mana per turn to sustain.
Upcast: Each +1 damage adds an additional strike.
Lore: The storm judges without bias.

Name: Show of Force
Description: Deal 3+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Lightning Damage to all enemies in a line.
Lore: Power announced is power respected.

Name: Crashing Wave
Description: Deal 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Water Damage. Targets must roll [Fortitude] or be pushed 1 tile, or prone on failure.
Lore: Water moves everything eventually.

Name: Formless Blade
Description: Deal 2 Water Damage. The target cannot be reduced below 1 Health and becomes Wet.
Lore: Water cuts without ending.

Name: Riptide
Description: A target takes 1 damage per tile moved this turn.
Lore: Movement has a cost.

Name: Snowball
Description: Apply Chill to a target.
Lore: Harmless—until it isn’t.

Name: Slip
Description: Create slippery terrain.
Lore: Ice changes intent.

Name: Shatter
Description: Deal 1 Cold Damage, or 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] if the target is Chilled.
Lore: Cold preserves—and then breaks.

Name: The List
Description: Reduce a target’s movement by 3 units until the end of their next turn. If this spell is applied twice to the same target, they become Immobilized until the end of their next turn. They must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Lore: Every name written is a step closer to stillness.

Name: Ancient Malediction
Description: Curse a creature. Their next attack deals 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] less damage (AoE attacks deal 1 less instead). The creature may spend 1 Action to remove this curse.
Lore: Old curses do not shout—they linger.

Name: Unworthy
Description: A creature suffers -3 Accuracy until the end of their next turn. If the target has less mana than you, they instead take 3 Dark Damage.
Upcast: Increase damage by +1 or penalty by -1.
Lore: Power recognizes its lesser.

Name: Fall!
Description: Reduce a creature’s carry capacity to one-third of its current value until the end of their next turn. They must roll [Fortitude] to resist.
Lore: Weight is not always physical.

Name: Salt and Stitches
Description: Resurrect a creature that died within the last scene for 1 hour. The creature is not under your control. During the final 20 minutes, its movement is halved.
Lore: Life can be borrowed—but never owned.

Name: Sown Seeds
Description: All allies in range who did not attack during the previous scene gain +1 damage on their next attack.
Lore: Restraint today becomes strength tomorrow.

Name: Troll Gifts
Description: Grant an ally 2+[your Spell Healing Bonus] Guard until the end of the round. If they already have Guard, they instead heal 2+[your Spell Healing Bonus] Health.
Lore: Blessings are not always given with grace.

Name: Indestructible
Description: When an ally would be reduced to 0 Health, they instead remain at 1 Health.
Lore: Some refuse to fall—not by strength, but by decree.

Name: Starlit Epiphany
Description: You regain all mana this turn. At the end of your turn, your mana becomes your previous amount minus 4.
Lore: Clarity comes all at once—and leaves just as quickly.

Name: Regain Vigor
Description: Deal 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Light Damage. If this is your first action this combat, heal yourself or an ally for the damage dealt.
Lore: The first light of day restores what was lost.

Name: Affliction
Description: Grant yourself or a willing creature +2 Grace until the end of the scene.
Lore: Suffering, chosen willingly, becomes power.

Name: Death Ray
Description: Fire a focused ray dealing 2+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Force Damage. Each time you cast this spell in the same combat, increase its damage by +2 (max 4).
Lore: Iteration refines destruction.

Name: Go Hard
Description: Deal 1 Force Damage and gain 1 Guard. Each time you cast this spell in the same combat, track it. On the 4th cast, instead deal 5 Force Damage in a 3x3 area.
Lore: Commitment escalates consequences.

Name: Ravenous Flock
Description: Deal 4+[your Spell Damage Bonus] Dark Damage to a creature that is either Immobilized or below half Health. Cannot target creatures that meet neither condition.
Lore: They gather where weakness shows.

Name: Spell Thief
Description: Spend 1 additional mana to cast one of the last 3 spells cast by another creature.
Upcast: You may choose from the last 5 spells instead.
Lore: Why learn when you can take?

Name: Nopeify!
Description: When a creature casts a cantrip, cancel the spell.
Upcast: You may instead impose -4 Accuracy on a non-cantrip spell.
Lore: Some magic simply refuses to happen.
